/chat_channel_types/help.o: Yes and yes. Intelligence is only useful for combat btw

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我就知道学校让我变聪明是别有用心！
/chat_channel_types/help.o: I knew schools had an ulterior motive for making me more intelligent!

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 通过用剑战斗提升智力等级是正确的选择吗？
你可以用任何你喜欢的方式提升智力
/chat_channel_types/help.o: you can level int using anything you'd like

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 任何战斗风格都行。你怎么就非要升级智力？是不是就想多装几个技能？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Any combat style works. Why are you fixated on leveling intelligence? Do you just want to equip more abilities?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 确保你有近战装备和近战武器哈
/chat_channel_types/help.o: make sure you have melee gear with melee weapons tho

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我想学习群体技能剧毒粉尘，升级好慢
但没错，你应该在低等级时同时提升所有属性（智力、耐力、攻击和防御）
/chat_channel_types/help.o: but yes you should be leveling everything at once at a low levels (int, stamina, attack and defense)

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 嗯，和「毒尘/毒尘埃」相关的你是指 {{0}} 吗？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: hmmm by "poison dust" do u mean {{0}}?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: @dagongji 把智力练到20非常快，就算没有饰品也一样。如果你觉得这慢，那我有个坏消息告诉你
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @dagongji Leveling to 20 intelligence is very fast even with no charm. If you think this is slow then I have some bad news for you

/chat_channel_types/help.m: gg，干得漂亮
非常正确
/chat_channel_types/help.o: very true

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 不过，如果你匹配装备，会有所帮助
/chat_channel_types/help.o: It will help if you match gear, however

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是啊，你不想用法师装备配近战武器吧
/chat_channel_types/help.o: yea u dont want to be using mage gear with a melee weapon

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 如果你想用剑，你需要用近战装备，也就是近战装，而不是给法师用的布甲。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: If you want to use a sword you need to use melee gear which is cheese gear, not cloth gear which is for mages

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 了解，但是我已经战斗了几个小时，才到15级智力
另外，如果你打算解锁{{0}}以便作为法师使用，那么现在坚持法师更合理。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Also if you are aiming to unlock {{0}} so you can use it as a mage then it would make more sense to stick with mage now

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 战斗是这样的 需要时间的，你才刚开始玩 慢慢来就好了
但是建议你先去生活攒点钱
我怀疑可能是你的装备和面对的敌人有问题。你有自然法杖和{{0}}吗？你在打什么敌人？
/chat_channel_types/help.o: I suspect maybe it's a problem with your loadout and what enemies you are fighting. Do you have a nature staff and {{0}}? What enemy are you fighting?

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 然后再去战斗 这样子会舒服很多
你还可以做智力咖啡，在战斗时使用
/chat_channel_types/help.o: You can also make Intelligence Coffee and use it while fighting

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我觉得他先去生活比较好
打敌人的最好方法就是干掉他们（通常）
/chat_channel_types/help.o: The best way to fight enemies it to kill them (usually)

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 智力咖啡并不会让你更快提升智力，只是告诉你一声
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Intelligence coffee will not level up your intelligence faster, just so you know

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 现在他直接去战斗 还没钱买吃的和喝的
前期不需要准备食物和饮料
/chat_channel_types/help.o: no need to get food or drink early game

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 大家记住啊，在美国拥有1898年前的加农炮不违法
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Now remember chat, it isn't illegal to own a pre-1898 cannon in the US

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 现在用的麻布套装和翠绿剑，配合经验经验咖啡打史莱姆，还没来得及买战斗套装
@xylovoi为什么？早期绝对还是很有用的。你不需要追求顶级装备，但特别是对于法师来说，它还是有用的。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: @xylovoi Why? It's definitely still useful early on. You don't need to be getting max tier stuff but especially for mages it can be useful

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我有200万金钱
用剑的话应该穿奶酪甲。布甲是给魔法用的。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: for sword you should use cheese armor. cloth armor is for magic.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 如果你想继续用剑，你应该先弄到合适的护甲。必要时卖掉你的魔法布甲。像你现在这样继续下去效率很低。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: If you want to continue with the sword you should first get the appropriate armor. Sell your magic cloth armor if you have to. Continuing as you are is very inefficient

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 获取所有奶酪装备
/chat_channel_types/help.o: get alllllll cheese gear

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的，谢谢
非常感谢！
可能能拿到那个 "翠绿" 奶酪装备，你的防御都超过10了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: can prob get the "verdant" cheese gear, as your defense is over 10

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 如果你要继续用剑的话，你现在要找的技能应该是{{0}}。用{{1}}+{{2}}效率不高
/chat_channel_types/help.o: If you are going to continue with the sword then the ability you are looking to get should now be {{0}}. Using {{1}}+{{2}} doesn't work efficiently

/chat_channel_types/help.m: {{0}} 将成为你新的 20 级 {{1}} 剑术近战技能
/chat_channel_types/help.o: {{0}} will be your new level 20 {{1}} ability for sword melee

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我以为用剑战斗升级智力会更快
前期用法杖副手应该装备什么？
不，别用剑
/chat_channel_types/help.o: nooo not with sword

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 除非你是法师，那就70级再用
/chat_channel_types/help.o: unless youre a mage, then use that at lvl 70

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 法师的第一副手会是{{0}}，我很确定
/chat_channel_types/help.o: mages first off-hand will be {{0}} im pretty sure

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 没有到35魔法等级之前副手空着吗？
并在低等级时和法师一起使用{{0}}，因为你现在拿着法杖
/chat_channel_types/help.o: and use {{0}} while at low level with mage since you have a staff on now

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是的，你可以空着
/chat_channel_types/help.o: yes you can leave it empty

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 他们想当自然法师，那我们简单点，直接发{{0}}链接好了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: They want to be a nature mage so how about we just keep it simple and link {{0}} instead

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 哦对，你可以用那个代替
/chat_channel_types/help.o: oh yes you can use that inmstead

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 代替*
/chat_channel_types/help.o: instead*

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 所以替换你的{{0}}并放上{{1}}
/chat_channel_types/help.o: so replace your {{0}} and put {{1}}

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 技能受益于装备提供的属性加成，这就是为什么匹配技能类型与装备类型很重要
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Abilities benefit from the stat bonuses given by your equipment which is why it's important to match ability type with gear type

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的，我已经装备上缠绕
火杖=火系法术，水杖=水系法术，自然杖=自然系法术
/chat_channel_types/help.o: fire staff=fire spells, water staff=water spells and nature staff=nature spells

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 明白
现在你应该没问题了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: and now you should be good

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 单手钝器光环带什么
我开始以为是AI答疑，原来你们是真人0.0
你刚开始用蓝可能会有点吃力，毕竟法师前期蓝耗挺高的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: your mana usage might be a little rough at the start tho as mage is kinda bad with mana early

/chat_channel_types/help.m: {{0}}@llkkdd
好的谢谢@Incinarator
哈哈哈是啊我们是真的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: hahahaha yea we're real

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我装备了两个回蓝的食物
这也许还行吧
/chat_channel_types/help.o: thats maybe ok

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 你也许该用酸奶和蛋糕代替
/chat_channel_types/help.o: you should maybe use a yogurt and a cake instead

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 因为你还需要一些HP回复
/chat_channel_types/help.o: as you'll still need some HP regen

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 只是免得你死了
/chat_channel_types/help.o: just so you dont die

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 可是回蓝跟不上消耗速度，没蓝只能普通攻击了
使用更高等级的食物实际上更高效，同时还更有效
/chat_channel_types/help.o: It's actually more efficient on top of being more effective to use higher tier foods

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 死了没有惩罚吧？我就是等他复活的
我觉得没有惩罚，就是等着耗时间 lol
/chat_channel_types/help.o: i dont think theres a penalty, just waiting and using time lol
{{0}}+{{1}} should work for now I think

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 好的好的
/chat_channel_types/help.o: okok

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 是的，可能会不错
/chat_channel_types/help.o: yea prob will be good

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 在狂暴机制中是有某种惩罚的。实际上对于市场奶牛来说，你根本不应该在战斗中死掉
/chat_channel_types/help.o: There is a form of penalty in the enrage mechanic. Really for market cows you should not be dying in combat at all

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 另外，总等级达到250后，你可以将你的背包升级为中背包
/chat_channel_types/help.o: also, once your total level is 250, you can upgrade your pouch to a medium pouch

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 那会允许再多一个茶/咖啡位
/chat_channel_types/help.o: that will allow another tea/coffee slot

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 然后500的大袋会给你另一个食物栏
/chat_channel_types/help.o: then large pouch at 500 will give you another food slot

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 我已经244级了，马上到达250级就可以再装备一个食物
澄清一下我之前的说法，{{0}}{{1}}非常高效。{{2}}{{3}}效率较低但不算太差。没有理由使用低于火星级别的HP食物。对于MP食物，软糖在更高等级时效率降低，就像你通常预期的那样。对于酸奶，{{4}}通常效率最高，但{{5}}也不错。
/chat_channel_types/help.o: To clarify my earlier statement, {{0}}{{1}} are very efficient.{{2}}{{3}} are less efficient but not too bad. There is no reason to use below mars tier hp food. For MP food the gummies become less efficient for the higher tiers like you may normally expect. For yogurt {{4}} is usually most efficient but {{5}} is fine too.

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 作为法师，你最终要用高级mp食物，但别太担心这个，因为价格值得，不会没mp
/chat_channel_types/help.o: Eventually as a mage you will have to use high tier mp food but don't worry about this too much as the price is worth not running out of mp

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 作为法师主号，我用{{0}}{{1}}{{2}}，但可能应该改用龙果的东西而不是星果
/chat_channel_types/help.o: as a mage main i use {{0}}{{1}}{{2}} but should most likely be using dragon fruit stuff instead of star fruit

/chat_channel_types/help.m: 但过一会儿我就喜欢用不同的东西了哈哈
/chat_channel_types/help.o: BUT i like using different things after a bit lol

guild.name: Fish
guild.noticeMessage:
🎮【群公告】🐮 佛系牛牛 · 快乐游戏 🌈
👪【公会大家庭】
🎉 Fish / Biu / BiuBiu / BiuBiuBiu 这四个工会是一个大家庭，阶下囚工会：WAKAKA 📌 QQ群：856720516，微信群请联系会长加入~

🚫【群规守则】
🔞 禁止内容:1)黄赌毒/暴力等违法内容;2)广告/诈骗/恶意链接;3)谣言/虚假信息;
🤝 文明交流：尊重他人，禁止人身攻击；理性讨论，拒绝恶意贬低

📚【战略资源库】
📖 牛牛战术手册：https://feishu.cn/docx/KG9ddER6Eo2uPx...
❓ 新手FAQ：https://feishu.cn/wiki/CaMdww091ioVvBk...
🏛️ 公会专属文档：https://www.kdocs.cn/l/cmYtJcua6e3I
🔒 温馨提示：公告内容请勿外传，闷声发大财~

🎁【公会福利】
💰 新人基金：3000K（游戏规则内礼物）
🎯 750级奖励：6000K大礼包
⚔️ 强化装备优惠
🤲 游戏规则内的资源互助

🌟 【公会荣耀榜】 🏆
🧙‍♂️ 战斗榜-魔法
steam火法榜：Bestcow、Goodknight
steam水法榜：weilan、Catopia
steam自然榜：Rose、Vikala、meon、17s
老登魔法：Lapapa、|allow、 Mfleaf 、NIUB1、heartfireX、xialu
🏹 战斗榜-远程
steam远程榜：Leica、Cra、OwenGod、SumimiCupid、starhong、 Boluobao
